stemHtml: ATC instructs a 360° right turn due to slower traffic ahead. Correct radio exchange?

options.a: "F-AX, make a three sixty turn right" / "Three sixty right, F-AX"
options.b: "F-AX, turn thirty six zero right" / "Turn thirty six zero right, F-AX"
options.c: "F-AX, turn right complete turn" / "Turn right complete turn, F-AX"
options.d: "F-AX, rotate to the right now" / "Rotate to the right now, F-AX"
